programmes.show_description: Turn it up to 11 for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!
These are the legendary rock stars that made the 80s! Expect Meat Loaf, Bonnie Tyler, Queen, Bon Jovi, AC/DC, Iron Maiden & loads more!
An hour of Anthems and the biggest rock songs from rock legends Guns N' Roses!
From Peter Frampton and Free to Foreigner & Fleetwood Mac - the 70s was a feelgood and carefree time for pop and rock, and we bring back that vibe with 30 of the absolute best!
Party pop rock anthems spanning 5 decades! From Queen, Kiss & Aerosmith to Blur, Paramore & The White Stripes.
The most iconic & ear-shattering rock songs that shaped the genre! Including Led Zeppelin's timeless Whole Lotta Love & AC/DC's rebellious Highway to Hell. Crank it up & enjoy!
Turn it up to 11 for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!
In order, an hour of every song a number 1 rock song in the noughties!
Crammed full with extraordinary finds, hidden treasures, and plenty of old relics! From the Stones and Genesis, to Iggy and Aerosmith - how many of these family heirlooms do you own?
A decade of mega hits and the loudest anthems! Expect Biffy Clyro, Linkin Park, Blink 182, Evanescence, Fall Out Boy & loads more!
These rebellious teens rocked every college campus throughout the 90s and 00s. Expect great tunes from Blink-182, Wheatus, Good Charlotte and many more!
From 2003 to 2006 - 30 minutes of the biggest rock songs from Evanescence!
A decade of mega hits and the loudest anthems! Expect Biffy Clyro, Linkin Park, Blink 182, Evanescence, Fall Out Boy & loads more!
Claire Sturgess relives her 50 greatest rock heroes with the music that defined the 90s! Blur, Foo Fighthers, Oasis and Nirvana are all in the top 10 - but who is at number 1?
Party pop rock anthems spanning 5 decades! From Queen, Kiss & Aerosmith to Blur, Paramore & The White Stripes.
The legends and bands that made the 00s rock! Expect anthems from Nickleback, Green Day, Linkin Park, The Arctic Monkeys, Evanescence and many more.
Turn it up to 11 all Easter weekend for the finest rock anthems! Featuring The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro, Sum 41, Kings Of Leon & The Foo Fighters.
Your Easter weekend anthems and the biggest rock songs from the last 50 years! From the Beatles and the Stones in the 60s right through to One Republic and Kings Of Leon in the 10s.
From 1995 to 2009 - 30 minutes of the biggest rock songs from Green Day!
Turn it up to 11 all Easter weekend for the finest rock anthems! Featuring The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro, Sum 41, Kings Of Leon & The Foo Fighters.
25 All-Killer 00s Dumbass Anthems! From Blink-182 and Wheatus to Fall Out Boy and Scouting For Girls.
Turn it up to 11 all Easter weekend for the finest rock anthems! Featuring The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro, Sum 41, Kings Of Leon & The Foo Fighters.
A definitive 6 hour marathon of 00s rock anthems in order! From Alien Ant Farm to The Arctic Monkeys, Fall Out Boy to The Foo Fighters, Weezer to the White Stripes.
Starting in 2001, here are the biggest rock songs from Linkin Park!
Alex Baker brings you the best, most sing-a-longable, rock party bangers of all time. If you love Green Day, The Foo Fighters, Bon Jovi and BMTH, then you are in for a treat!
100 of the biggest feel-good rock songs for your Good Friday! Featuring anthems from Bowie to Queen, Blink-182 to The Stones.
